summary: The workstation is a long desk with a central monitor and chair; the keyboard sits on the right side near stacks of papers/books and a desk lamp, with drawers on the far right and a computer tower under the desk.

payload.answer: Around the keyboard (right side of the desk) there are stacks of papers/books and assorted documents, with a desk lamp at the far right end of the surface. The overall layout is a long wall-length desk: a monitor is positioned near the center with a rolling office chair in front, a computer tower sits on the floor under the desk, and the right end has built-in drawers; there’s also another chair on the left indicating the desk serves multiple spots. (frame 0)
supporting_claims: Keyboard is on the right side of the desk beside stacks of papers/books and near a desk lamp. (frame 0)
Monitor is centered on the desk with a rolling chair in front; a desktop tower is under the desk. (frame 0)
Desk spans the wall and includes drawer cabinets on the right; an additional chair appears on the left. (frame 0)

uncertainties: The keyboard is visible only partially; some nearby small items (e.g., mouse or specific peripherals) are not clearly identifiable from this frame.

evidence_items.claim: A computer monitor sits on the desk near the center, with a rolling office chair in front of it.
A desktop computer tower is on the floor under the desk (left of the chair).
The keyboard is on the right side of the desk, near a pile of papers/books and next to a desk lamp at the far right.
The desk extends across the wall and includes drawer cabinets on the right side; another chair sits to the left, suggesting a multi-workstation surface.
